name: session-select-hardcoded-ko
desc: Localize the hardcoded UTF-16LE session-selection header/card labels in the EXE .data table. These strings are not MsgDat and are not covered by the .rsrc patcher.
verified: ENCODED 2026-06-29: live session-hangeulmenu-2d96-20260629 proved the session picker still rendered Japanese even after koreanMenuMode WriteProfileStringW succeeded and MsgDat constmsg IDs were Korean. Raw-byte scan found the visible labels in .data at file offsets 0x38d910..0x38d9b8 and related command label at 0x38c790. All replacements are UTF-16LE same-length.

patches.note: Hardcoded UTF-16LE '拠点選択' -> '거점선택' (same 4 code units)
Hardcoded UTF-16LE '選択可能セッション数' -> '선택 가능 세션 수' (same 10 code units)
Hardcoded UTF-16LE 'プレイするセッションを選んで下さい。' -> '플레이할 세션을 선택해 주십시오.' (same 18 code units)
Hardcoded UTF-16LE '経過時間      ' -> '경과 시간     ' (same 10 code units)
Hardcoded UTF-16LE full-width 'ＶＳ' -> ASCII 'VS' (same 2 code units)
Hardcoded UTF-16LE '自由惑星同盟' -> '자유행성동맹' (same 6 code units)
Hardcoded UTF-16LE '銀河帝国' -> '은하제국' (same 4 code units)
